head: current_direct_bbox
hypothesis: E-35: Clean 50ep ceiling test. DIoU + MV3-Small + T=5 + 224 + bs=16 + resized_root. Quality mainline extended to 50ep. Core question: does 30ep->50ep yield meaningful gains (>0.005 mIoU)? E-31 reached 0.3111 at 30ep (bs=16, no resized_root). If best > 0.316, extending training is worthwhile. If ~0.311-0.314, architecture is at ceiling — pivot to scheduler or regularization.
